A Summer Escape for Two Couples
Five Nights · Sun, Sand, and Easy Living
June 30 – July 5, 2026
Departing Corpus Christi · CRP
2 Couples · 4 Travelers
Your Trip at a Glance
At a Glance

Three options, one easy decision

You came to me with two clear ideas — Puerto Rico's Condado/Ocean Park strip, or a return to Santa Maria Suites in Key West — plus an open ear for anywhere similar. So that's exactly what I've laid out below. Three real options with real pricing, plus one bonus suggestion at the end if you want to dream a little bigger. Scroll through, tap the price bar of any hotel that catches your eye, and the cost summary at the bottom will update for you in real time.

2BR / 2BAPool · Beach · Kitchen

Holiday Note

What I've Built Into Every Option
  • Real availability and pricing for your exact dates
  • 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, full kitchen, pool, A/C
  • Beachfront or one-block-from-beach properties only
  • Round-trip flights from CRP with realistic connections
  • Properties that work for two couples — privacy + togetherness
  • Walkable neighborhoods so you don't *need* a rental car
Next: Getting You There
Flights

Out of Corpus Christi

CRP doesn't fly nonstop to either destination, so expect one connection (typically through DFW or IAH). Quick read on what to budget for the air portion of each option — actual itineraries we'll book closer to date once you pick a destination.

Estimated Round-Trip Airfare · Per Person · Economy
A
Corpus Christi → San Juan (SJU)
1 stop (DFW or IAH typical) · ~7–9 hrs total · ~$500–700 pp round-trip for early-July dates
B
Corpus Christi → San Juan (SJU)
Same as Option A · 1 stop · ~7–9 hrs total · ~$500–700 pp round-trip
C
Corpus Christi → Key West (EYW)
1 stop (DFW or MIA typical) · ~6–8 hrs total · ~$425–550 pp round-trip for early-July dates
Agent's Note on Flights
July 4 week is a peak travel period. Booking 6+ weeks ahead is meaningfully cheaper than 3 weeks ahead — and seats sell out by destination not by route, so the sooner we lock down the destination, the better the airfare we can secure for all four of you.
Next: Option A · Condado Beach
Option A · Puerto Rico

Condado Beach, San Juan

Right on Ashford Avenue — restaurants, casinos, and the beach are all out the front door. This is the most "resort-feeling" of the three Puerto Rico options.

Option A · Most Walkable Location
2BR Beachfront Apt · Condado Mar
Ashford Avenue · 50 yards from Condado Beach
This is the closest match to your original brief: 2BR/2BA, on the beach, pool, full kitchen, A/C, outdoor space, on Ashford Avenue. Tap the big black price bar below — it will turn green when selected and the cost summary will update.
Starting From · 5 Nights · 2BR Apt
Tap to Select ✓ Selected
from$2,125
~$425/night + taxes & fees
Layout
2 BR / 2 BA
Sleeps
Up to 6
Distance to Beach
~50 yards
Check-In
3 PM · self check-in
Heated pool Full kitchen In-unit washer/dryer Balcony A/C Smart TV Ashford Ave 10 min from SJU

A 2BR/2BA apartment in the Condado Mar building — arguably the most convenient address in the neighborhood. You're steps from the sand, with a supermarket, pharmacy, and dozens of restaurants inside a three-block radius. A short Uber takes you to Old San Juan and La Placita for dinner. Building has a heated pool, secure entry, and the unit is fully kitted out for two couples.

Agent's Note · Why I Like This One
This is the option I'd book if I wanted a Santa Maria Suites feel but in a more vibrant city setting. You won't need a rental car — everything is walkable, Ubers are cheap and plentiful, and Condado at sunset is genuinely magical. The trade-off vs Key West: a longer flight, but the food scene and beach quality are noticeably better.
Next: Option B · Ocean Park
Option B · Puerto Rico

Ocean Park, San Juan

Quieter, more residential, more "real Puerto Rico" — Ocean Park is the locals' favorite stretch of beach. Less nightlife, more authentic.

Option B · Quietest & Most Local
Ocean Breeze · Ocean Park 2BR
Ocean Park · Steps to Calle Loíza · Walk to beach
Ocean Park is San Juan's chill cousin — the same beautiful Atlantic beach as Condado, but quieter and more residential. This is an actual VRBO listing — Ocean Breeze, 2BR suite. Tap the price bar below to select this option.
Starting From · 5 Nights · 2BR Suite
Tap to Select ✓ Selected
from$2,175
~$435/night + taxes & fees
Layout
2 BR / 2 BA
Sleeps
Up to 5
Walk to Beach
~5 minutes
Listing
VRBO direct
Pool Full kitchen Free parking King bed Beach towels Smart TV Calle Loíza dining 10 min from SJU

Ocean Breeze is a real VRBO listing in Ocean Park with a 2BR/2BA layout, full kitchen, pool, and a 5-minute walk to one of the best beaches in San Juan. Calle Loíza is a half-block away with the city's best food district. The unit pulls strong reviews for cleanliness and the host's responsiveness — and the rate ($381–$542/night depending on calendar) lands meaningfully below Condado for the same amenity set.

Agent's Note · Who This Is For
If you and your travel partners are the kind of couples who would rather wake up to the sound of waves than DJs, pick this one. The trade is location energy: Ocean Park is residential. You'll Uber 5 minutes to Condado for nightlife and 10 minutes to Old San Juan for sightseeing. The pool is shared — more like a quiet plunge than a resort pool.
Next: Option C · Key West
Option C · Florida Keys

Santa Maria Suites, Key West

The known quantity. You've stayed before, you know what you'll get — and the price reflects the peak July 4 holiday week.

Option C · Familiar Favorite
Santa Maria Suites Resort
1401 Simonton St · 1 block from the Atlantic
You know this property. The vibe — laid-back luxury, full kitchens, two pools, Duval at the doorstep, daily muffins and Dove bars — is exactly what brought us to Puerto Rico as the comparison. Tap the price bar to lock this in if the certainty wins out.
Starting From · 5 Nights · 2BR Flat
Tap to Select ✓ Selected
from$3,450
~$690/night + taxes & resort fee
Layout
2 BR / 2 BA · 960 sqft
Sleeps
Up to 5
To Duval Street
1 block
To Beach
1 block
2 heated pools Gourmet kitchen In-suite laundry Daily muffins & Dove bars Wine happy hour Concierge Onlywood Grill on-site King beds

You know it: 950+ sqft of living space, two king bedrooms each with their own spa-style bath, queen sleeper in the living area, full kitchen with chef's island, private balcony overlooking the gardens. Two heated pools with poolside smoothies, fresh fruit, chilled towels. Walk to Duval, walk to the Southernmost Point, walk to the beach.

Agent's Note · The Honest Math
July 4 in Key West is the most expensive week of the year there. Santa Maria's two-bedroom flats run roughly $580–700/night that week, before the resort fee. That's why this option lands ~$1,300+ above the Puerto Rico options for the same five nights. If you love it, it's worth it — but I want you to see the gap clearly before deciding.
Next: One More Idea to Consider
One More Idea

If You're Open to Something Bigger

You said "if you know another vacay spot similar, let me know." Here's the one I'd actually steer you toward — plus a few activity ideas for whichever destination you land on.

The Caribbean spot most similar in vibe to Santa Maria Suites — but a clear step up in beach quality — is Grace Bay, Turks & Caicos. Same condo-style two-bedroom suites with kitchens and pools, but on a beach that's been voted #1 in the world more years than I can count. It costs more in flights and lodging, so I've added it as a "stretch option" below. Tap any of these to flag interest and I'll pull a full quote.
Stretch Option · Caribbean Alternative
Grace Bay, Turks & Caicos · 2BR Beachfront Condo
Wymara Resort or West Bay Club · ~$650–950/night · ~$3,800–5,200 for 5 nights · world's #1-ranked beach
Activity Ideas · Puerto Rico (Options A & B)
El Yunque Rainforest Half-Day Tour
Waterfalls, swimming holes, easy hike · ~$75–120/pp incl. transport
Old San Juan Walking + Food Tour
Cobblestone streets, El Morro fort, mofongo tasting · ~$90/pp
Bioluminescent Bay Kayak (Fajardo)
Evening kayak through glowing water · ~$65/pp · best around new moon
Catamaran Day Sail to Icacos Island
Snorkel, lunch, open bar · ~$135/pp · full day
Activity Ideas · Key West (Option C)
Sunset Sail with Open Bar
2 hours, drinks & light bites · ~$80/pp
Dry Tortugas National Park Day Trip
Ferry, fort tour, snorkel · ~$220/pp · 10 hrs · book early
Hemingway Home + Mallory Square Sunset
Self-paced, $18 admission + free sunset show
Dining I'd Personally Recommend
1919 at Condado Vanderbilt (PR)
Fine dining, ocean view, AAA Five Diamond · ~$120–180/pp
Marmalade (Old San Juan, PR)
Tasting menu, intimate room · ~$95–140/pp
Louie's Backyard (Key West)
Oceanside Caribbean classic · ~$60–90/pp
Blue Heaven (Key West)
Bohemian brunch institution, no reservations · ~$25–45/pp
